data.title: Relativity Acquisition Corp. Shareholders Approve Business Combination with Instinct Brothers
data.description: Today, in an extraordinary general meeting, Relativity Acquisition Corp. (OTC: ACQC) announced that shareholders approved the business combination with Instinct Bio Technical Company Inc., a key player in the stem cell and regenerative medicine field. The meeting took place in New York, NY, Las Vegas, NV, Tokyo, JP, on March 24, 2026. A Form 8-K detailing the voting results will be submitted to the SEC shortly. This move marks a significant development for Relativity as they move forward with this strategic partnership.

data.title: Egan-Jones Comments on SEC Order Denying Its Application for Exemptive Relief
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Egan-Jones Ratings Company released a statement regarding the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) denial of their application for a temporary exemption from a rule limiting the total amount. This decision was made in response to an Order issued by the SEC on March 23, 2026. The specific rule in question imposes constraints on the quantity of (include important numbers here).

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Laura Jacqueline Elleby as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In a recent event in Blue Ridge, Georgia on March 24, 2026, Laura Jacqueline Elleby was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Her exemplary efforts in advancing Elevate Luxury Real Estate with E+E Group of Compass were highlighted in the acknowledgment.

data.title: NYT claims Pentagon violates court order issuing new media guidelines; company calls it an "end-run."
data.description: In a recent legal document, the company mentioned that the department tried to circumvent regulations by introducing updated media guidelines on Monday.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall On U.S. Peace Plan To Iran; 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: Stock market futures increased, while oil prices dropped following reports that the U.S. has proposed a peace plan to Iran. President Trump noted Tehran's positive response, stating they are "talking sense." Notable is the rise in Dow Jones futures and the fall in oil prices, marking a significant shift in market trends. Investors are advised to keep an eye on seven key stocks amidst these developments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Turns Negative As Nasdaq Slides; Palantir Retreats (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the primary stock indices ended the day with decreases, with small-cap stocks showing better performance. Modine emerged as a notable gainer. The Dow shifted to a negative position, alongside a decline in the Nasdaq. Palantir experienced a decline in its stock value.

data.title: The Pool Factory Expands Nationwide Service, Strengthening Its Position as a Leading Online Provider of Above Ground Pools in the United States
data.description: Edison, New Jersey, on March 24, 2026 - The Pool Factory, a prominent company in the above ground pool sector, revealed today its ongoing expansion of services throughout the United States. With an extensive range of above ground pools, they are now catering to homeowners nationwide, offering one of the most extensive selections in the industry.

data.title: ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING APPROVES BOARD OF DIRECTORS' PROPOSALS
data.description: The 58th Annual General Meeting of Sika AG, held in Zurich on March 24, 2026, saw the approval of all the proposals put forth by the Board of Directors by the shareholders.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Deephaven Residential Mortgage Trust 2026-INV2 (DRMT 2026-INV2)
data.description: New York - KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage-backed notes from Deephaven Residential Mortgage Trust 2026-INV2. The mortgage loans in DRMT 2026-INV2 are backed by first liens on non-owner occupied (NOO) investor properties. These loans were exempt from the ATR/QM rule as they were originated for business purposes. As of the cut-off date, the pool consists of 1,130 residential mortgage loans, with 99.4% being fixed-rate. These loans are seasoned and have been in existence for a while.

data.title: Zero Press Release Domains Appeared in Loganix's 100-Query AI Category Test
data.description: A recent study involving a 100-query test conducted on Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Gemini has revealed that press releases play a crucial role in enhancing the visibility of AI systems. The analysis indicated that this visibility is achieved through the entity and training layers rather than through category recommendations. Interestingly, the study found that citation rates for press releases were at 0% across 10 different verticals. This study, conducted in Seattle, sheds light on the importance of press releases in the AI space.

data.title: Stratus Properties Inc. Board of Directors Unanimously Approves Plan to Dissolve and Sell All Assets, Estimating Total Stockholder Distributions of $29.73 to $37.69 Per Share
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Stratus Properties Inc. (NASDAQ: STRS) revealed its Board of Directors has given approval for a complete liquidation and dissolution plan following the strategic review disclosed on March 11, 2026. The Plan outlines the dissolution of the Company and orderly sale of all or nearly all of its assets. The net proceeds from the sales will be distributed to the Company's stakeholders. The Board unanimously agreed to this decision.

data.title: International Petroleum Corporation Publishes Prospectus for Bond Listing on Euronext Oslo Børs
data.description: International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) has received approval from the Swedish Financial Supervisory Authority for the listing of its USD 450 million 7.50 percent senior unsecured bonds (ISIN: NO0013671107) on Euronext Oslo Børs. Trading of the bonds is anticipated to commence on or around February 6, 2026. IPC, traded on TSX and Nasdaq Stockholm as IPCO, made the announcement today.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Crude Oil Prices Top $90 On Tanker Attacks, Port Disruption
data.description: Stock futures dropped as crude oil prices continued to climb due to recent tanker attacks and disruptions at ports caused by the conflict with Iran. AI stocks saw gains on Wednesday following positive news from Nvidia and Oracle. Dow Jones futures were affected by the rising oil prices, which exceeded $90.
